MINI MINUTES: Commissioner: William Gargano; Clerk NBautista ; Not Reported. (D218)
Appearances:
Plaintiff, Tenderloin Housing Clinic is present. Represented by Leona Luckette
Attorney,Arnole Evje, appearing for the plaintiff.
Defendants, Paul Harris and Sandra Stoney, are present.
Attorney,Jason Mauck, representing the defendant through limited scope.
The Judge Pro Tem Philip Keith, litigants and counsel confer privately in Dept. 305B , for settlement discussions.
The parties enter into a signed agreement, which was filed.
This case settled, the trial date of APR-26-2010 is vacated.
